label: Transparent sand dollar motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a sand dollar shell, isolated complete subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single intact sand dollar shell from a sandy tideflat, flattened round-oval test with natural cream shell color, subtle sand-tan staining, soft sea-foam gray-green shadow undertones, fine velvety pore texture, five-petal flower pattern clearly visible, tiny edge notches and accurate natural symmetry.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; top-down or slightly angled studio view; do not crop the shell edge.
Lighting/mood: clean even studio light that preserves the matte shell texture, shallow relief, pore details, and quiet coastal minimalism.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no beach scene, no water background, no decorative background, no second shell, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.
postProcessing: Removed the chroma-key background with the bundled imagegen remove_chroma_key.py helper using border auto-key, soft matte, and despill; validated RGBA alpha and transparent corners.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sand Dollar" derived from the visible transparent sand dollar shell cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the visible cream shell body, sand-tan staining, sea-foam gray-green undertones, five-petal relief pattern, fine pore texture, rounded notched shell edge, and quiet sandy tideflat context. The board must visibly respect the motif colors and be usable as the source for coding a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design-system board, target 3840x2160, 4K-class source.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels, strong hierarchy, and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Sand Dollar", motif story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance with short readable Japanese sample text.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius scale, border samples, shadow samples, shell-pore texture samples, app sample usage.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, minimal coastal system, calm product-workflow interface, 8px card radius, shell-pore micro-textures, five-petal geometry as subtle dividers, tideflat spacing, restrained coastal clarity.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: shell ivory #fbf4e6, cream shell #efe1c7, sand tan #c8aa7f, dune gold #d9bd83, sea foam #9eb7ac, tidal teal #5f8f86, driftwood umber #6f5842, pore shadow #8a785f, deep kelp ink #263431. Avoid a one-note beige palette by using sea-foam and tidal-teal accents clearly but sparingly.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs. Exact text may include "Morphous Sand Dollar", "Palette", "Typography", "日本語", "Components", "Dashboard", "Forms", "Tokens".
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of "Morphous Sand Dollar".
postProcessing: Final public board was resized in place to 3840x2160 to satisfy the Morphous source-asset dimension requirement.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Sand Dollar light design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 4K design-system poster, target 3840x2160 or the largest available horizontal resolution. Fill the full horizontal canvas with a crisp interface board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable section labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent sand dollar motif and the visible light-mode Morphous Sand Dollar board as references. Preserve palette roles, shell-pore texture, five-petal geometry, 8px component language, tideflat calm spacing, English typography, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Sand Dollar", "Dark Mode", Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep kelp ink and driftwood umber; foreground from shell ivory; cards from dark tidal teal and pore shadow; primary actions from sea foam and tidal teal; accents from dune gold and sand tan. Use subtle shell-pore and five-petal relief overlays, not bright decoration.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance with short readable Japanese sample text.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius scale, border samples, shadow samples, texture samples, app sample usage.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style dark product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, minimal coastal operations interface, restrained contrast, tactile shell-pore texture, calm sea-foam highlights.
Color palette: motif-derived only: deep kelp ink #263431, driftwood umber #6f5842, pore shadow #8a785f, tidal teal #5f8f86, sea foam #9eb7ac, shell ivory #fbf4e6, cream shell #efe1c7, sand tan #c8aa7f, dune gold #d9bd83.
Text: short readable UI labels only. Exact text may include "Morphous Sand Dollar", "Dark Mode", "Palette", "Typography", "日本語", "Components", "Dashboard", "Forms", "Tokens".
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sand Dollar".
postProcessing: Final public board was resized in place to 3840x2160 to satisfy the Morphous source-asset dimension requirement.
